lessons.title: Hello & ABC
lessons.topic: Greetings and the sound of A

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do we say when we are happy to see a friend?
What is a word that starts with the letter 'A'?
What does an apple sound like when you start saying its name?

items.example: I am saying hello to you.

steps.title: Ben's School Day
steps.text: Hello! I am Ben. This is my teacher. I have an apple. Hello, Teacher!

questions.question: Who is Ben saying hello to?

steps.explanation: Use 'I have' to say what you own.

steps.audio_text: Hello! I am a student. I have a big apple for my teacher!

steps.prompt: Say: Hello, I am a teacher.

questions.question_text: I ___ a student. (Grammar question)
Which picture shows 'apple'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hello' is a greeting word.
What sounds does 'apple' start with?
Who is in the classroom?

lessons.title: Morning & Pets
lessons.topic: Daily Greetings and sounds of B and C

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who says 'Hello' in the video?
questions.hint: This person welcomes you at school every day.

questions.question_text: Which pet is making a 'Woof' sound?
questions.hint: This pet loves to wag its tail when it sees you.

questions.question_text: What sound does a cat make in the video?
questions.hint: It's a soft sound that a furry pet makes.

steps.title: My Fun Morning
steps.text: Good morning! I am happy. I have a blue ball. This is my cat. Hello, Cat!

questions.question: Who does he say hello to?

steps.explanation: Use 'I see' for things you look at.

steps.audio_text: Good morning! I have a blue ball and a friendly cat. How are you today?

questions.question_text: I have a ___ cat. (Grammar question)
What do we say in the morning?
Which word starts with 'B'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: A cat is a pet.
What sound does 'C' make in 'cat'?

lessons.title: My Friend
lessons.topic: Identity and sounds of D and E

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What animal goes 'buzz' and makes honey?
What makes a woof sound and loves bones?
Who loves to eat bamboo and says 'meow'?
questions.hint: This black and white bear lives in China.

items.example: I have an egg to eat.

steps.title: My Special Day
steps.text: This is Emma. She is a girl. Emma has a pet dog. The dog is her friend. 'I have an egg for you,' she says.

questions.question: What does Emma have for the dog?

steps.explanation: Use 'I have a' to show things you own.

steps.audio_text: Hello! My name is Emily. I have a friend. This is my dog and he loves his new egg.

questions.question_text: This is my ___. (Grammar question)
Which word is a boy's friend? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: Dogs can lay eggs.
What sound does 'dog' start with?
What do we say when meeting someone new? (Reading comprehension)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which word starts with the same sound as 'Ant'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'a' sound like in 'ant'.

questions.question_text: Which word starts with the same sound as 'Frog'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'f' sound like in 'frog'.

questions.question_text: Which word starts with the same sound as 'Dog'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'd' sound like in 'dog'.

steps.title: Anna's Garden
steps.text: Hello! I am Anna. This is my garden. I have flowers and a bird. The bird sings.

questions.question: What does Anna have in her garden?

steps.audio_text: Hello, I'm Ben. I have a blue car. It's really fast.

questions.question: Is Ben's car fast or slow?

steps.prompt: Say: I am happy and this is my book.
steps.expected_text: i am happy and this is my book

questions.question_text: I ___ Ben. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'teacher'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hello' is a greeting.
This is my ___ elephant. (Reading comprehension question)
